---
title: Telework availability varies across major occupation groups
description: Bar chart showing telework availability by major occupation group from
  BLS Occupational Requirements Survey.
date: '2026-05-07'
layout: default
permalink: /charts/rural-economic-outlook-telework-by-occupation/
categories:
  - Chart
  - Labor Market
  - Technology
tags:
  - BLS-ORS
  - Telework
  - Occupations
  - Remote Work
  - Bar Chart
image: telework_by_occupation.svg
chart:
  title: Telework availability varies across major occupation groups
  chartType: bar
  interactive: false
  source: Bureau of Labor Statistics, U.S. Department of Labor
  sourceUrl: https://www.bls.gov/ors/
  featured: false
producedBy: rural-economic-outlook
usesDatasets:
  - bls-ors-telework
usesPackages: []
usesResources: []
format:
  gfm:
    toc: false
    wrap: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

![This chart shows telework availability by occupation group, revealing which jobs can be performed remotely.](./telework_by_occupation.svg)

## Overview

This chart shows telework availability by occupation group, revealing which jobs can be performed remotely.

## Key Findings

- Management and professional occupations have the highest telework availability
- Production, transportation, and service occupations have limited telework potential
- Occupational composition explains much of the rural-nonrural remote work gap

## Reproducibility

Generated by `R/viz/presentation/telework_availability_ors.R` in the producing project.


::: {.callout-note}
## Dangling references

The following slugs are referenced by this project but do not yet have nodes in Dataverse. They are intentionally preserved as future content needs:

- `dataset/bls-ors-telework`
:::
